chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Suit No. 1051 of 2020 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1.For hearing of CMA No.11311/23 2.For examination of parties/settlement of issues 17.08.2023 Mr.Akhtar Hussain, Advocate for Plaintiff Mr.Farjad Ali Khan, Advocate for Defendant Ms.Sara Rasheed Representative of MICADR ---------- 1. Through this application, Representative of MICADR seeks this Court’s indulgence to nominate alternate Co-Mediators. It appears that the Order dated 07.08.2023 may not be clear. It is clarified that MICADR is at liberty to appoint whosoever may be available on MICADR’s Mediation Panel. Representative of MICADR submits that 90 days period has expired. Counsels for parties request for an additional 30 days’ time to complete the mediation. Request granted. Time allowed. Office is directed to put up the matter in Court after expiry of 40 days from the date of this Order for settlement of issues. J U D G E Ashraf
